chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 09 of 2008 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Main Petition. 09.04.2026. None present......... No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet shows that this matter has not been pursued for a long period of time. Matter has remained pending for over 15 years. Even today no one is in attendance to pursue the matter. This JCM accordingly stands dismissed. J U D G E Ayaz
